dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptySubtitle: Start your first CBT session with Mira to begin tracking your mental health journey.
dashboard.noMoodData: No mood entries in this period
dashboard.noEmotionData: No emotion data in this period
dashboard.noSessionData: No session data in this period
dashboard.noInsight: Complete a CBT session to see personalized insights.

hero.title: Your AI companion between therapy sessions
hero.subtitle: Talk to Mira — an AI trained in CBT. Track your mood. Understand your patterns. Share progress with your therapist.
hero.chatMessage1: I've been feeling really overwhelmed this week.
hero.chatReply1: I hear you. Can you tell me more about what's been happening? Sometimes naming the feeling helps us understand it better.
hero.chatMessage2: It's like everything is too much at once.
hero.chatReply2: That sounds exhausting. Let's try to slow down together and look at one thing at a time.

stats.label1: of people with anxiety never receive treatment
stats.label2: average wait for first therapy appointment
stats.note: Between sessions, you're on your own. MindBridge changes that.

founder.quote: I built MindBridge because I needed it myself
founder.body1: Two years ago I started having panic attacks. I didn't understand what was happening — I just knew something was wrong. I found a therapist, and it helped. But between those weekly sessions, I was alone with my anxiety, with no tools and no support.
founder.body2: I kept thinking: what if AI could be there in those 6 days and 23 hours between sessions? Not to replace my therapist — but to help me track patterns, practice CBT techniques, and actually arrive at my next appointment with real data instead of "well, it was kind of a rough week."
founder.placeholder: Replace with your real story — this is a placeholder.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Share what's on your mind. Mira listens without judgment, asks the right questions, and guides you through CBT exercises.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Log your mood daily. Watch trends emerge. Understand what triggers your anxiety and what helps.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your therapist sees AI-generated insights before each session — so you spend time healing, not catching up.

features.title: Everything you need between sessions
features.f1Desc: Structured cognitive behavioral therapy conversations, available any time of day or night.
features.f2Desc: Log how you feel and which emotions are present. See trends over days and weeks.
features.f3Desc: After every session: automatic analysis of emotions, thought patterns, and progress.
features.f4Desc: Your conversations stay between you and Mira. We never sell your data.

therapists.title: For therapists
therapists.subtitle: Understand your patients between sessions
therapists.body: Your patients talk to Mira between appointments. You get AI-generated insights before each session — so you can focus on what matters.
therapists.b1: See mood trends, anxiety and depression levels
therapists.b2: Get AI summaries — save 2+ hours per week
therapists.b3: Color-coded patient list: who needs attention now
therapists.b4: Generate detailed session reports in seconds
therapists.t1Desc: Try it with your first 3 patients

pricing.title: Simple pricing for everyone
pricing.note: Connected to a therapist? You get unlimited access included.

cta.disclaimer: Mira is an AI companion trained in CBT techniques. She's here to support you between sessions — not to diagnose or treat. If you're in crisis, please call a crisis line or go to your nearest emergency room.
cta.title: Ready to start your journey?
cta.subtitle: Free to begin. No credit card required.

footer.crisis: If you're in crisis, please call your local emergency services.
footer.copyright: © 2025 MindBridge. Not a replacement for professional help.
